call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. 
Eleanor: Yeah, let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I'm confident this Personal Loan will be a great fit for you. Just need a few more details to confirm…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: No, thank you. I'm not interested. And please, don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan. I understand you were referred by our partner, GreenTech Solutions? 
Jessica: Yeah, that's right. I'm looking to consolidate some business expenses. 
Agent: Perfect! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. The terms are very flexible. 
Jessica: Okay, that sounds… good. What's the repayment schedule like? 
Agent: We offer terms from 24 to 72 months. A 60-month term would result in monthly payments of around $332. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. Are there any early repayment fees? 
Agent: No, absolutely not. We encourage you to pay it off as quickly as you can. There's a small origination fee of $300. 
Jessica: $300? Is that negotiable? 
Agent: Let me see what I can do… I can potentially waive $100 of that fee, bringing it down to $200. 
Jessica: Okay, that's better. I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Excellent! Let's get started with the application process. I'll just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Brown? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a… 
Michael: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! I'm unemployed, okay? I don't need a Signature Credit Card with a 24.99% interest rate! 
Agent: Sir, I understand your frustration, but… 
Michael: No, you don't understand! I'm struggling as it is! Just take my number off your list! 
Agent: I can certainly do that, sir. 
Michael: Good! *click*

Agent: Good afternoon, Mrs. Davis. This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about a Personal Loan on our website. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, dear. I did. I'm a little hard of hearing, could you speak up a bit? 
Agent: Certainly, Mrs. Davis. Apologies. We are pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 10.49%. You've been a valued customer for several years, so we're happy to offer you this rate. 
Patricia: 10.49%? That sounds… reasonable. What would the monthly payments be? 
Agent: For a 60-month term, the monthly payments would be approximately $178. 
Patricia: Oh, my. That's… a lot of numbers. Could you repeat that, please? 
Agent: Of course. $178 per month for 60 months. There's a small origination fee of $150. 
Patricia: Hmm. I'm thinking about getting a new roof. 
Agent: A new roof is a great investment, Mrs. Davis. This loan could certainly help with that. 
Patricia: I need to think about it. Could you send me some information in the mail? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll send you a detailed brochure outlining all the terms and conditions. Would you also like a follow-up call next week to discuss it further? 
Patricia: Yes, that would be lovely. Thank you, dear.
